# scroll(to:)

**Instance Method**

Scrolls the view to the specified point.

## Declaration

```swift
func scroll(to point: NSPoint)
```

## Parameters

- **point**: The point to scroll to.

## Scrolling

- **scroll(to:)**: Scrolls the view so that it includes the provided rectangular area.
